title: IIT Dhanbad Recruitment 2026 - Apply for Project Associate I Posts
description: Indian Institute of Technology Dhanbad (IIT Dhanbad) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for various Project Associate I Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the B.E/ B.Tech, M.E/ M.Tech, M.Sc, and MCA can grab this chance and apply for the IIT Dhanbad Recruitment 2026 . Here, we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. If you are looking for more, here is a ...
